claims.claim: The public Xperience-10M sample has been converted into aligned model windows.
claims.boundary: 5,821 frames, 1,161 windows, one public sample episode

claims.claim: The current feature contract is explicit and reviewable.
claims.boundary: 8,378-d feature vector; audio is documented but not yet featurized

claims.claim: The 12 task heads are real scripts and artifacts, not presentation placeholders.
claims.boundary: chronological single-episode split, not cross-episode generalization

claims.claim: Minimal and neural heads use the same task contracts.
claims.boundary: small heads only; not a foundation model

claims.claim: Four Ropedia research directions are mapped honestly as direct, proxy, or diagnostic evidence.
Four extra direction probes are coded and evaluated.
claims.boundary: single-episode probes, not full research-direction solutions

claims.claim: Qwen3-Omni infrastructure has passed technical smoke checks.
claims.boundary: one episode, 128 train windows; not a 32-episode pilot

claims.claim: The real 32-episode LoRA pilot is blocked on gated data access, not on repo presentation.
claims.boundary: no 32-episode metric should be claimed until the gate passes
